_draftStatus: [DRAFT — NOT NEUTRAL UNTIL HUMAN-REVISED] AI-drafted starter content. Verify factual plausibility, anti-stereotype calibration, and structural parity with the other three affidavits before treating as production content. The symmetry CI test must not run on this file until reviewed.
name: Debarghya Pal

education.institution: West Bengal Board of Secondary Education

profession.details: Founder, Bangabhumi Shiksha Samiti — a network of 14 Bengali-medium primary schools across rural Hooghly serving roughly 3,800 children. Long-standing organiser of cultural-heritage festivals and small-trader cooperatives in the Burdwan-Hooghly belt.

declaredAssets.summary: ₹3.4 crore total: ₹65 lakh movable (bank deposits, jewellery, agricultural-equipment cooperative shares), ₹2.75 crore immovable (ancestral residence in rural Hooghly plus 4.2 bigha of inherited paddy land jointly held with siblings).

affidavit.priorPublicServiceDetails: MLA, Pursurah (2016–2021). Panchayat samiti member, Pursurah block (2003–2008, 2008–2013). Founder-trustee, Bangabhumi Shiksha Samiti (since 2001). Lifetime member, Bangiya Sahitya Parishad's Hooghly chapter.
